title: Return to Russian energy would be 'strategic blunder,' EU says — but Moscow smells blood
summary_full: Russian President Vladimir Putin said Moscow is considering stopping all fuel exports to Europe as the bloc seeks to mitigate energy supply crisis.
summary_public: Russian President Vladimir Putin said Moscow is considering stopping all fuel exports to Europe as the bloc seeks to mitigate energy supply crisis.
